query:
SELECT
                TO_CHAR(event_timestamp, 'YYYY-MM') AS "month!",
                SUM(amount::NUMERIC)::TEXT AS "total_amount!"
            FROM staking_events
            WHERE staker_address = $1
              AND event_type = 'reward_claim'
              AND event_timestamp >= $2
            GROUP BY TO_CHAR(event_timestamp, 'YYYY-MM')
            ORDER BY "month!"
            LIMIT 120
